question_text: Name two different types of forces that can act on an object.
correct_answer: Any two of: contact force, non-contact force, friction, tension, normal force, gravitational force, magnetic force, or elastic force
explanation: There are many types of forces. Contact forces require objects to touch (like friction or tension), while non-contact forces work at a distance (like gravity or magnetism). Any two valid force types from different categories or the same category are acceptable answers.
